identity.name: E1: The Anti-AI Designer
identity.mission: Create a premium, human-centric HRMS that breaks the sterile 'SaaS' mold.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix 'Swiss Precision' with 'Organic Warmth'.
Emotion First: HR is about people. The UI should feel calm and trustworthy.
Content is King: Ticket details are the story. Make them readable.
Negative Space: Use the '#efede5' background to let content breathe.
anti_patterns: No default scrollbars. Use custom thin ones.

layout_strategies.dashboard: Use 'bento-grid' class. Mix col-span-4 (stats) and col-span-8 (charts).
layout_strategies.ticket_list: Use 'table-premium'. Row hover effects are mandatory. Status pills must be prominent.
layout_strategies.ticket_detail: Two-column layout: Left (70%) for conversation/timeline, Right (30%) for metadata/actions. Use 'sticky' positioning for the right sidebar.
layout_strategies.form_modals: Use 'glass' class for modal backgrounds. Inputs should have 'bg-white/50' to blend with the cream background.

buttons.primary: bg-[#063c88] text-white hover:bg-[#052d66] rounded-xl px-6 py-2.5 font-medium shadow-lg shadow-blue-900/10 transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#063c88] border border-[#063c88]/20 hover:bg-blue-50 rounded-xl px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-all
buttons.destructive: bg-red-50 text-red-600 hover:bg-red-100 rounded-xl px-6 py-2.5 font-medium

cards.interactive: card-premium p-6 hover:shadow-xl cursor-pointer transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1

inputs.default: bg-white/50 border border-slate-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2.5 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#063c88]/20 focus:border-[#063c88] outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-slate-400

badges.base: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium border

motion.page_transition: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -10 }} transition={{ duration: 0.3 }}
motion.list_item: initial={{ opacity: 0, x: -20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.2, delay: index * 0.05 }}

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text-slate-500 is used only on white/light backgrounds. Use text-slate-600 for better legibility.
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must have visible focus rings (ring-2 ring-primary/20).

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1: Update `index.css` to ensure all custom properties are active if not already.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_2: Create a `Layout` component that wraps the app with the Sidebar and Topbar.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_3: Implement the `TicketCard` component with the status pill logic.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Ensure the Ticket Creation Form uses the `glass` modal style.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_6: Integrate Cloudinary upload widget in the ticket form.
instructions_to_main_agent.critical: Do NOT use default ShadCN cards for the main dashboard widgets. Use the custom `stat-card` class defined in CSS.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Create depth through layered design elements.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
All interactive elements MUST include `data-testid` attribute.
